==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|alt=𠈇,𡖊,𡖕}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etyl}}
The oracle bone script consisted of {{zh-l|*月|moon}} and {{zh-l|*丮}}, and resembled a man holding the moon, probably representing the worship of the moon. Alternatively, it might represent a person working under the moon in the early morning when the moon has not set.

In some forms of its bronze inscription, {{zh-l|*月}} corrupted into {{zh-l|*夕}}.

{{zh-l|*丮}} later got reduced into {{zh-l|*凡}}.

===Etymology===
{{zh-ref|Schuessler (2007)}} compares this with {{cog|tbq-lob-pro|*C-sok ~ *V-sok||morning; morrow}}, which STEDT derives from {{cog|tbq-pro|*s(j)u-ŋ/k||to wake up; morning; clear-headed; to sober up}}. {{ncog|my|သောကြာ||Venus}} is unrelated as it ultimately derives from {{ncog|sa|शुक्र}}.

{{zh-ref|Schuessler (2007)}} also considers this to be related to {{cog|tbq-pro|*m-sow||to arise; to awake; to awaken}}, as the morning is the time to arise. Other possible Chinese comparanda of this {{cog|tbq}} word are {{och-l|搜|to move}} (as in {{zh-l|搜搜}}), {{och-l|速|speedy}}, {{och-l|聳|to urge on}} (STEDT).

==Japanese==

===Kanji===
{{ja-kanji|grade=|rs=夕03}}

# [[early]] [[morning]]
# [[early]]
# since long ago

====Readings====
{{ja-readings
|goon=すく
|kanon=しゅく
|kun=つと-に, はや-い, まだき-
}}

===Etymology===
Derivation unclear.  A surface analysis suggests that this may have been a noun with a sense similar to "early time".

Only appears as part of other words first attested in {{w|Old Japanese}} and {{w|Early Middle Japanese}}.  Not listed on its own in monolingual Japanese dictionaries.<ref name="NKDc">{{R:ja:NKD Concise}}</ref><ref name="DDJS">{{R:Digital-Daijisen}}</ref><ref name="DJR">{{R:Daijirin}}</ref>

Attested as part of the adverbial phrase {{m|ja|夙に|tr=tsuto ni}} in the ''{{w|Man'yōshū}}'' poetry anthology of 759.<ref name="MYS">{{RQ:MYS|18|4111}}</ref>

===Pronunciation===
{{ja-pron|つと}}

===Affix===
{{ja-pos|affix|つと|hist=つと}}

# {{defdate|from 759}} {{q|possibly}} early time, especially early in the morning

====Derived terms====
* {{m|ja|夙に|tr=tsuto ni||from before, from earlier; early in the morning}}
* {{m|ja|つとめて|tr=tsutomete||the morning; the dawn; {{q|especially}} the morning after some other event}}
